insight: Procedural damage uses PhysicalEngine gravitation that clears vanilla explosion blockList and replaces it with its own falling-block logic. Vanilla blast resistance is irrelevant — canExplode() decided what falls, and originally allowed any solid non-interactable block including bedrock/barrier/command_block. When such blocks sit above air (e.g. arena floor over void), they get turned into falling blocks and vanish. Fix is filtering by Material.getHardness() < 0 in canExplode().
